name: io.github.xnjiang/autowhisper-mcp
description: Drive your AutoWhisper AI CMO to generate and publish marketing content from any MCP client.

environment_variables.name: AUTOWHISPER_API_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: Your AutoWhisper API token (autowhisper.xyz/skill -> Settings -> Connect your agent).

environment_variables.name: AUTOWHISPER_BASE_URL
environment_variables.description: Override the API base URL for self-hosted or staging instances.
